$ switchyard --data-dir <DATA_DIR> --endpoint unix://<DATA_DIR>/switchyardd.sock --no-color --format json widget install example.invalid/widget:missing
exit: 1
stdout:
stderr:
Error: unavailable: registry_unreachable: widgetpack: pull example.invalid/widget:missing: failed to perform "FetchReference" on source: Get "https://example.invalid/v2/widget/manifests/missing": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid: no such host
Usage:
  switchyard widget install <oci-ref> [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for install

Global Flags:
      --data-dir string    data directory (default "<DEFAULT_DATA_DIR>")
      --endpoint string    API endpoint (unix:///path or tcp://host:port)
      --format string      auto|table|json|yaml (default "auto")
      --log-level string   error|warn|info|debug (default "warn")
      --no-color           disable ANSI color
  -v, --verbose            --log-level=debug shortcut

unavailable: registry_unreachable: widgetpack: pull example.invalid/widget:missing: failed to perform "FetchReference" on source: Get "https://example.invalid/v2/widget/manifests/missing": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid: no such host
